mentions.note: Restaurant group rallying; made big move already; group dynamics (Yum, Texas Roadhouse) positive but valuation run already initiated.
Caller Norma owns at $88, stock at $91; Cramer agrees on fresh food quality and value; next Chipotle potential; hold and buy on pullback.
Fast-casual concept attracting young, health-conscious, value-oriented diners. Packed restaurants; best of new concepts. Tasty, clean, fun.
Stock up 40% YTD but down 3 today. Wait for $73–75 entry; don't chase at current levels. Good company, bad recent stock performance warrants patience.
